method: Empirical re-validation — scripts re-run (lint exit 0, build script resolved), config flags re-read, gate-logs counted, edited data files grep-verified, constitution.md L1 untouched confirmed. No report trusted without source-of-truth verification.

package.json scripts.build = 'npm run typecheck && npm run kairos:web:build' present; no 'Missing script: build'
core-config.yaml boundary.frameworkProtection re-read = true, consistent with 97 active deny rules

Verified: constitution.md still lacks Art VII / IV-A and was NOT touched — L1 boundary correctly respected. The literal 'violations=0' design gate is architecturally unreachable in this task without an L1 violation.
npm test does not invoke tests/hooks/* locally (covered by CI test.yml). Non-blocking.

grep confirmed capture-session-insights pointer removed from .claude/agents/aiox-dev.md (editable surface clean)

residual.note: Not a fixable defect; route via @aiox-master *propose-modification when Story 7.1 builds the task. Score withheld 1pt vs 98 target because the L2 residual cannot be cleared without violating boundary.

structure_consistency.reason: The 3 MEDIUM + 5 LOW orphans (registered-but-unwired checklists/templates) driving the 83 score were OUT OF SCOPE for Phase 2 remediation — they belong to a dedicated cleanup story, not the governance sync. No regression introduced. Routing recalibration (FP-01/FP-02) improved task categorization but does not feed the structure tally.

critical_path.V-DRIFT-004: Logged (L1 boundary respected — constitution.md untouched, deferred to @aiox-master *propose-modification)
critical_path.routing: Recalibrated (FP-01 threshold weight 50->60, FP-02 categorization 13-category distribution; 8/8 routing tests pass)

quality_gates_reverified.npm_run_lint: exit 0 (real ESLint, no warnings/errors in governance scope)
quality_gates_reverified.npm_run_build: script resolves (typecheck + kairos:web:build), no Missing-script error

gate_decision_rationale: The design's literal strict gate (violations=0 AND broken_refs=0 AND data_errors=0) is NOT literally met, but the residuals are boundary-deferred items, not unfixed defects: (1) V-DRIFT-004 cannot be resolved without modifying constitution.md (L1, NEVER modify) — correctly deferred to @aiox-master; (2) DR-001 residual is plannedDeps inside an L2-protected file, not reference-rot; (3) structure orphans are an out-of-scope cleanup-story concern with no regression. All genuinely fixable quality blockers were resolved AND empirically re-verified (lint exit 0, build present, frameworkProtection=true, 3 data refs cleaned, 15 gate blocks active). Per the spawn criteria (Constitution >=95 OR clear progress; Data >=98 OR 0 broken refs; Gates active; PASS), all alternative criteria are satisfied: Constitution +30pt clear progress, Data 0 activatable broken refs, Gates active (15 blocks), critical path resolved. Verdict is PASS with documented CONCERNS so the residuals are not lost — they are tracked for @aiox-master and a future structure-cleanup story. Inflating to a clean PASS would misrepresent the L1/L2 residuals; failing would penalize correct boundary discipline.

concerns.item: V-DRIFT-004 — constitution.md still v1.0.0 without Art. VII / IV-A. Route via @aiox-master *propose-modification (bump to >=1.1.0).
Structure consistency 83 < 90 target — 3 MEDIUM + 5 LOW orphan (registered-but-unwired) checklists/templates. Recommend a dedicated cleanup story to wire or deregister them.
V-ART5-005 — npm test does not invoke tests/hooks/* locally (CI-covered). Add `node --test tests/hooks/*.test.js` to local test command.
DR-001 L2 residual (document-gotchas.md plannedDeps -> capture-session-insights.md, Story 7.1). Clear when Story 7.1 builds the task.

notes: Final validation re-ran sources of truth rather than trusting Phase 2 reports. Before/after: Constitution 62->92 (+30, target 95 via clear-progress), Data 94->97 (target 98, 0 activatable broken refs), Structure 83->83 (orphans out of scope, no regression). Gates healthy: 15 violations blocked across Art. II/III/IV/V-VII, all articles active. Boundary discipline intact: constitution.md (L1) untouched, no L2 writes — the remaining constitution violation is deliberately deferred to @aiox-master rather than force-fixed in violation of the framework boundary. ready_for_3_2: true.
